---
title: "The Rev. George Frederick Maclear"
---

## The Rev. George Frederick Maclear

**Dates:** (1833-1902)

### Description

writer on missionary history

### Biography

He was author of <i>A History of Christian Missions during the Middle Ages</i>  (Cambridge, Macmillan 1863) [ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from July 14th 1865
- Letter from July 10. 1865
- Letter from Febry 10th 1865
- Letter from Feb 8 1865

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
